Setting up my new blog
29 Jun 2014

So I've finally decided to start blogging about things that i find interesting. What exactly did this consist of? Finding a framework for a blogging site, and deciding what to blog about.

First agenda create a blog

So I searched far / wide looking for suitable frameworks to use for blogging before stumbling upon Jekyll. So you may be asking what makes Jekyll so special? Well the answer is simple, it's easy to use, fairly simple to setup, and creating post is a breeze. So you should probably change your question to why wouldn't you use Jekyll? There's tons of articles on the internet about getting started with Jekyll so i won't be providing a play by play.

What am i going to be blogging about?

Well that's an easy question to answer. I'll be blogging about anything technological that i find interesting whether it be some new framework, or some new handheld that's caught my eye. This will give you the opportunity to find out what i'm interested in.
